case_title: MICHAEL JAY NOORDEWIER VS. MARTIN FRANCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-25-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-05-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
